name: Mike Franken
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
When we set out our goal for November we knew it would be a stretch. We wanted to challenge this dedicated group, and folks, I'm so glad we did.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello folks, When we set out our goal for November, we knew it would be a stretch. We wanted to challenge this dedicated group, and folks, I'm so glad we did. Not only did you raise Jordan's initial goal, but you hit my expanded goal. I'm so grateful for your support, and I'm looking forward to meeting and surmounting more challenges in the future. But for now, I'll simply say: thank you. With respect, Mike Franken
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Iowa
---

---

name: Cory Booker
subject: Join me in fighting back against a system that is denying candidates of color access to the debate stage while paving the way for billionaires.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
As it stands right now, you see won't see our party's diversity reflected on the December debate stage.
| | |
---
| Team, I'll get right to the point: Six candidates currently in the race are qualified for the DNC's December debate. But as it stands now, after starting with the most diverse presidential field in our nation's history, you might not see our party's diversity reflected on that stage. **Not a single one of the candidates who have qualified for the December debate is a person of color. And that 's a shame.** **These thresholds have had the effect of denying candidates of color access to the debate stage while paving the way for billionaires who are inflating their support through massive ad buys.[I'm asking for your donation right now to help me qualify for the December debate by placing ads in the early states.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191203_CB_20191203-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This race is still far from decided. No one knows who we will choose as our party's nominee in Milwaukee next July. But it would be unacceptable if our final choices did not reflect the rich diversity of our party. **[We need a debate stage that fully reflects the Democratic Party, not one limited to candidates with massive donor bases and billionaires who are able to buy their way onto the debate stage. Please donate to my campaign to help me qualify for the next debate.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191203_CB_20191203-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Put me on that debate stage and I'll demonstrate that I can, and I have, united moderate and progressive Democrats. I'll demonstrate that I can, and I have, excited and engaged Black voters, the most loyal constituency of our party. And I'll demonstrate that I am the only person in this race who can rebuild the coalition that elected President Obama that we need in order to defeat Donald Trump. We are the party of diversity. We are the party of inclusion. Let's start acting like it. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191203_CB_20191203-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d99/5fca0d19/78da2f52/291cbcde/3201300987/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d99/5fca0d19/78da2f52/291cbcdd/3201300987/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d99/5fca0d19/78da2f52/291cbcdc/3201300987/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d99/5fca0d19/78da2f52/291cbcdb/3201300987/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d99/5fca0d19/78da2f52/291cbcda/3201300987/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d99/5fca0d19/78da2f52/291cbcde/3201300987/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Holcomb Endorsement Alert
subject: Our campaign just made history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
The Indiana Chamber of Commerce just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s 2020 re-election campaign — it’s only the second time ever they’ve endorsed a... | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=19ff555b616b436b84d653c7130e3d9c&_e=y3HAKD8axB5NWVsUzk22-pDJLHtbZY5ALwqBc-1TeO-_VfRwsW7cW43W-ByZbw840eJ2otaKpFMqMxSYx48qUwU6agrID7bpi6CcSexZcOxeSXnVbxnUaUCe7X_NyJdBhuFYu1S1libHcQb1IXQRbbgJIklCMn50tVSSvNyFQ3Z471oHDVMrxujBU0E7LKwHZFp0XNOr2_oGoVd37Cr8eij-mnRhGMf40XkJKeTiCcC-ixp5MnELslkYSU5WB3IHvZxOl1kCyj8ejGaAc18DT4Nw2Kkn1FWv8jXYyCY6qURzGeNdoyR8DNxohP3FSPNpFfvdpQIfq6f2MqCK1WA24w_aMmiKGrpqZymLcgeL6UsM3b2Y0EnMuMIEfqPC763O8oU62vw8qKTfNPP3KrDvPQSUaiKLF0Sgq4xOclRALTg%3D) |
---|---|---
Friend,

**We’re honored. **

The Indiana Chamber of Commerce just endorsed Governor Holcomb’s 2020 re-election campaign — **it’s only the second time ever they’ve endorsed a gubernatorial candidate.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=19ff555b616b436b84d653c7130e3d9c&_e=y3HAKD8axB5NWVsUzk22-pDJLHtbZY5ALwqBc-1TeO-_VfRwsW7cW43W-ByZbw840eJ2otaKpFMqMxSYx48qUwU6agrID7bpi6CcSexZcOxeSXnVbxnUaUCe7X_NyJdBhuFYu1S1libHcQb1IXQRbbgJIklCMn50tVSSvNyFQ3Z471oHDVMrxujBU0E7LKwHZFp0XNOr2_oGoVd37Cr8esuau7m9LrYmfaXhjnJbkAW0_28uJhvrq65lgzq_Nyw2auTRROxNVl9gTsqvEGf1r9pLJe9cSTANcKbT_SWsXDYjcgWKWRsZQvaTfaCWeRgb2PrGRPShB4RuSimwz3IJde_T50gjA1K30B18EJHuN7ersTVRG3ZFmYmyehHvC3g-KZYtWlwHJCoRefI_TqB_CvLn77J96PmJcYjJG_r3nZw%3D)
[ **Join the Chamber in Endorsing Governor Holcomb** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=19ff555b616b436b84d653c7130e3d9c&_e=y3HAKD8axB5NWVsUzk22-pDJLHtbZY5ALwqBc-1TeO-_VfRwsW7cW43W-ByZbw840eJ2otaKpFMqMxSYx48qUwU6agrID7bpi6CcSexZcOxeSXnVbxnUaUCe7X_NyJdBhuFYu1S1libHcQb1IXQRbbgJIklCMn50tVSSvNyFQ3Z471oHDVMrxujBU0E7LKwHZFp0XNOr2_oGoVd37Cr8eka8QqP9blRp2C7s6_LMlHW0S9D_1vWHiVsAXOJSraGiPN_ESOLcvwcrTt59kBuLeRfihsPa0lS6MN7pO6uXG7iwsyvAmyMkAXXTSSioyqziUL0oy19-GKwkeSfg1TEWCVtHdWRvuAHYHR30eP0A1Jxe7cTcCoGBITo7szA4UH9fFtbOuy_LVUC2zEd8n4ypoeH08yhSmJwEXWvqE8jrNXA%3D)
_The Indiana Chamber is the state’s largest advocate for job creators. They share our priorities (ranging from more workforce training opportunities to historic road construction and more!) and our mission of Putting People First — that’s why we’re so happy to have their endorsement. _

The Chamber endorsed Gov. Holcomb because he’s worked tirelessly to boost Indiana’s economy and prepare Hoosiers to succeed in the 21st century.

**Just take a look at the Governor’s record over his first term: **
* **Enrolling 20,800 Hoosiers in free courses and helping 7,200 Hoosiers earn a high-demand credential while working on the job. **

* **Fully-funding a long-term infrastructure plan that will build Indiana’s roads over the next quarter-century without taking on new debt.**

* **Leading Indiana’s largest-ever single state investment in broadband infrastructure for unserved communities**

* **Expanding Pre-K access, with more than 3,500 students low-income children served**

* **Reduced overdose deaths down 12.9% across Indiana**

[ **Join the Chamber in Endorsing Governor Holcomb** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=19ff555b616b436b84d653c7130e3d9c&_e=y3HAKD8axB5NWVsUzk22-pDJLHtbZY5ALwqBc-1TeO-_VfRwsW7cW43W-ByZbw840eJ2otaKpFMqMxSYx48qUwU6agrID7bpi6CcSexZcOxeSXnVbxnUaUCe7X_NyJdBhuFYu1S1libHcQb1IXQRbbgJIklCMn50tVSSvNyFQ3Z471oHDVMrxujBU0E7LKwHZFp0XNOr2_oGoVd37Cr8egLgvP9h46ErjUwa2MQPjYDu0xqCrC6KVjRjEYmf9JkIV-ceuH9NhMpHEnmxXPC0cWq0rTtMipTCwzem4zNjaiHnuI22Uk72qiN43xPI5Vr9eSp2b9MCtGOF99nchzWRt9Wf3i5DwNJ71xWFNmnzmSChSlT7D_E0nqcpk8Mol6m4P3EpmHhzsd6TQplifDsOKcR9Vs1_bCsw8ZIThNCqaCo%3D)
Governor Holcomb couldn’t be more thankful for the Chamber’s endorsement, but he knows there’s more work to be done.

_“All Hoosiers deserve access to the gains of Indiana’s growing economy – for themselves, their families and their futures. It’s all about Putting People First. That’s why we’ve worked to expand training opportunities, while also making sure Indiana’s environment is primed for what’s next. And we’re just getting started. I’m honored to accept the Indiana Chamber’s endorsement, and I’m excited to work with Hoosier job creators to make sure we keep delivering for Hoosiers.” - Governor Eric Holcomb _

If you want another four years of Putting People First, please join the Indiana Chamber of Commerce in endorsing Governor Holcomb.
[ **Join the Chamber in Endorsing Governor Holcomb** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=19ff555b616b436b84d653c7130e3d9c&_e=y3HAKD8axB5NWVsUzk22-pDJLHtbZY5ALwqBc-1TeO-_VfRwsW7cW43W-ByZbw840eJ2otaKpFMqMxSYx48qUwU6agrID7bpi6CcSexZcOxeSXnVbxnUaUCe7X_NyJdBhuFYu1S1libHcQb1IXQRbbgJIklCMn50tVSSvNyFQ3Z471oHDVMrxujBU0E7LKwHZFp0XNOr2_oGoVd37Cr8ensF2wPr9P2qUs5nGbcC2zT3p_zO8nht6LUPNIZqJzi2iE9H1NxBjlivfog6IG5nBTtVghXSoFRhGyp-CJD0iAkf1jS9AdFxUodbgfk-VXXTM5JrXnD6OmlZr9K_QemjPjgJr_gslbE0TvK90cmtDSu81Gex5FwXKgQdvGS-KPK0nvegFccb9wawZFpefnSghcFv5j_KGX1tNl2gSyREoHw%3D)
Best,

Holcomb Crew
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Happy “Giving Tuesday”
body:
Hope you find an organization to give back to this giving season. | |
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=279e33035b&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Share](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=77419ec927&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
| | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7d1a52ae97&e=f6564bbe3b) | [Tweet](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=2bdb54b67c&e=f6564bbe3b)
---|---
|
## Happy “Giving Tuesday”
---
| | There are a few more hours left in “Giving Tuesday” and I want to encourage you to give back in some way if you haven’t already. If you’re looking for a good organization to support I have a few that are near and dear to my heart that I hope you will consider.

[Yellow Ribbon Fund’s](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=90bf099974&e=f6564bbe3b) mission is to provide practical support for wounded, ill and injured service members and their caregivers. Learn more and support their cause [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=019a4353cc&e=f6564bbe3b).

[The Independence Fund’s](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9ca1bff259&e=f6564bbe3b) mission is to empower our severely wounded Veterans and their Caregivers to take control of their lives, through programs and all-terrain tracked wheelchairs. Learn more and support their cause [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3b1d04ea8a&e=f6564bbe3b).

[The Pancreatic Cancer Action Network’s](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fc38255895&e=f6564bbe3b) mission is to save lives, through: research, clinical initiatives, patient services and advocacy. Learn more and support their cause [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b371ff4234&e=f6564bbe3b).

I hope you are able to find a way to give back this giving season however that may be.
---
| Thanks again for your support,

_Sean_
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Perdue?=
subject: Stand with President Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PERDUE FOR SENATE**
body:
Are you fed up with the impeachment sham? Let the Democrats know here! | |
---

#
Since day one, radical Democrats have been determined to obstruct – and yes, IMPEACH – President Trump. Tomorrow, they’re resuming their impeachment sham in the House.

The Democrats are determined to take America down the road to SOCIALISM. They are determined to undo the positive results we’ve achieved since President Trump took office.

[**I want to show these Democrats that the American people are FED UP with their political games. Will you SIGN our petition to defend President Trump right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=c4c0416a67&e=02cd889ad3)
---
| [STAND WITH TRUMP >>>](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=cbc50a3c89&e=02cd889ad3 "STAND WITH TRUMP >>>")
---
| I’ve had enough of this impeachment sham! Washington should be focused on results, like passing the USMCA. Congress should be supporting President Trump’s agenda, because it’s working. Instead, Democrats are obsessed with stopping our President.

The Senate majority is the last line of defense from their partisan impeachment sham. We have to defend it all costs, and that starts with YOU.

**I want to send Democrats a message that the American people aren’t falling for their political games.

I want to let President Trump know we have his back.

But I can’t do this without you. **

[**SIGN our petition now to stand with the President.**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=eb5778a42c&e=02cd889ad3)

Thank you for everything.

David Perdue

name: Zach Graumann
subject: Billionaires think our democracy is up for sale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We need to prove them wrong

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U) Yang Gang --

We’ve known for a long time that, sadly, money can buy relevancy in our democracy.

Billionaire candidates are spending huge sums of money to purchase airtime and other valuable resources to force their way into the discussion.

**There’s only one thing that can stop these billionaires from taking over this primary: You.

[So we’re asking, can you chip in $10 or more right now to send a message to the billionaires in this race that this election isn’t for sale? ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=5&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=8&amount=25&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)
---
The power of our message is undeniably stronger than their money -- that’s how Andrew’s been able to go from obscurity to a top contender for the Democratic nomination for president. It’s also how we’ve built one of the strongest grassroots armies in the history of politics -- and raised millions in small-dollar contributions.

It’s also the main reason that our campaign is the only one that has continued to grow while others falter. Slowly but surely, people hear Andrew’s message and join our campaign. And once they do, there’s no going back.

**[You can’t buy the Yang Gang’s passion, energy, and support. Let’s show them that our grassroots movement together is more powerful than their billions -- chip in what you can now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=7&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)**

Thanks for everything you’re doing to make our campaign stronger,

Zach Graumann
Campaign Manager
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18741?t=6&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4075%2E377263%2ELg1__U) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

subject: Addressing inequality:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
[__Click here to read about the Affordable Housing plan.__](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BWTJRnH5WhxscHG1gi0zJ-2BpkE2F-2Fy0GnsERzYYAHy9MdMtsxtv0W3Gk179anmeiEkfIDzGt5pavSGIDFp3jp7Z0gAE0DqtM5YbwvNVDqHwAxvc-2FyRbGIpIU2cZ-2FELXZp4-2F1gD-2B8Ks6iJJB1PDjYTrzmeyo1n2qX2Er6oGS2PI8vTtM-2BGjuuTY8D13eOCD7rJxUxEtwmayV3pzermlIvigXb_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfg3liVgFI7Ps41yqocNKzDyqeLF8plhh7nkZfbQXUtcCQer7LkK1TO2jZUrDwCfJviq7t4zY9wSXVw8-2F2t-2FwKhIdMwdh10MOPRM0UfUhFHlgDShk1O0VWmR5moiCVxQZT4pHiFF0K9Tcj5JTg4LLW8tGE0sq4Gr7-2FvHhml4d-2F9-2FWLhoU2QuvRiYFe7HKFCT9Vmj2l-2BcaFA8wvAp8XVAro5S0GvwNuxWFsbsLbMuYOJ23fy2OSlTA8BugTQzrwU78oUk-2BrPzMGG3A9N-2BgaOIqkW1wG644w4-2FZy8pa-2Bp2Fl12mix6-2FAKi6E2Fctr7A24XLaoWFCqUSpHRK3WJudohklvEuuuprgIvfKU9HHfBzKOMtNFyz-2F-2BqaDvzPqZnHdYvIo-3D) Friend, Systemic inequity, a corporate takeover of housing stock, and a system that favors landlords over tenants have put us in a housing crisis. An effective solution must begin by addressing this country’s history of racist, discriminatory housing policies — policies that continue to hurt Americans today. This is what Tom means when he says that we must prioritize people over profits. As president, Tom will invest $47 billion a year in affordable construction and renovation, build green infrastructure in redlined neighborhoods, and introduce laws that protect at-risk communities. And that’s just the beginning. **Our next president must prioritize finding concrete solutions to these systemic issues. clean_body: | | | | Friend, Systemic inequity, a corporate takeover of housing stock, and a system that favors landlords over tenants have put us in a housing crisis. An effective solution must begin by addressing this country’s history of racist, discriminatory housing policies — policies that continue to hurt Americans today. This is what Tom means when he says that we must prioritize people over profits. As president, Tom will invest $47 billion a year in affordable construction and renovation, build green infrastructure in redlined neighborhoods, and introduce laws that protect at-risk communities. And that’s just the beginning. Our next president must prioritize finding concrete solutions to these systemic issues. Will you support Tom’s campaign today with a $1 donation? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Let’s take the first step toward a more equitable America together. name: Michael Bennet
subject: I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
This race is wide open and predictions are constantly missing the mark | |
---
| Friend: [I'm going to ask you to make a $29 donation to my campaign, but first let me explain why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba957/134673f2/9e4fc3d/6997bc0f/960501599/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Some big things happened over the last two days: Two more candidates suspended their presidential campaigns and billionaire Tom Steyer bought his spot on the DNC debate stage.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba957/134673f2/9e4fc3d/6997bc0f/960501599/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

While some top tier candidates have been forced out of this race and other candidates are fully bankrolling themselves, our campaign is fighting for the long haul with your support. Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[This race is wide open and predictions are constantly missing the mark. That's why it's crucial that we keep our foot on the gas.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba957/134673f2/9e4fc3d/6997bc0f/960501599/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Our average online donation is $29, but any amount you can contribute today will help fuel our campaign to victory. Friends, I 'm asking, will you chip in today? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba957/134673f2/9e4fc3d/6997bc0e/960501599/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

I'm the only candidate in this race who's won two tough national elections in a purple swing state. I know how we can win back the 9 million people who voted twice for Obama and once for Trump.

We won't do it with empty promises of free stuff or a billionaire's bank account.

[We will win this race by reaching out to the vast majority of undecided voters who are looking for a unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba957/134673f2/9e4fc3d/6997bc0f/960501599/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This fight is far from over, friends, but I crunched the numbers with my finance team and we need to ratchet up our fundraising.

[**I 'm counting on this team to step up and fuel our campaign to victory. I know we can do it with your help. Will you chip in $29 (or whatever you can afford) right now?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba957/134673f2/9e4fc3d/6997bc0e/960501599/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Thank you,

Michael

subject: Kamala Harris and Kirsten Gillibrand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Kamala Harris and Kirsten Gillibrand -- two women senators who, together, won more than 11.5 million votes in their last elections -- have been forced out of this race, while billionaires... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b78b/45c30650/11f4a6b39/66f986ee/4248311046/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Kamala Harris and Kirsten Gillibrand -- two women senators who, together, won more than 11.5 million votes in their last elections -- have been forced out of this race, while billionaires Tom Steyer and Michael Bloomberg have been allowed to buy their way in.

Our party and our democracy deserve better.

Our democracy should not be for sale, and yet, billionaires have been able to use their money to try to buy this election outright.

Running for president shouldn't be a passion project for bored billionaires. Billionaires shouldn't have the power to recruit their other billionaire friends into this race, or make threats about what they'll do to the American economy if they don't get their way.

**Elizabeth is running to be the best president that money can't buy. She doesn't sell her time to the wealthy, doesn't hold fancy fundraisers with special access for big donors, and isn't beholden to corporate interests or their lobbyists. She's in this fight for working people.

We're going to root out corruption in Washington right at the source -- and level the playing field for working people in this country -- but we need your help.** [**Will you chip in whatever you can right now to fight back and make your voice heard?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b78b/45c30650/11f4a6b39/66f986d3/4248311046/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTExRl9FR1JfQklMX0NfMjAxOTEyMDNfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM11F_EGR_BIL_C_20191203_V1S3_P")

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I'm asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
This race is wide open and predictions are constantly missing the mark | |
---
| Friend: [I'm going to ask you to make a $29 donation to my campaign, but first let me explain why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc05/2103125832/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Some big things happened over the last two days: Two more candidates suspended their presidential campaigns and billionaire Tom Steyer bought his spot on the DNC debate stage.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc05/2103125832/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

While some top tier candidates have been forced out of this race and other candidates are fully bankrolling themselves, our campaign is fighting for the long haul with your support. Since I refuse to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step I take in this journey is because supporters like you are with me, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[This race is wide open and predictions are constantly missing the mark. That's why it's crucial that we keep our foot on the gas.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc05/2103125832/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Our average online donation is $29, but any amount you can contribute today will help fuel our campaign to victory. Friends, I 'm asking, will you chip in today? >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc04/2103125832/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc19/2103125832/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc18/2103125832/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
I'm the only candidate in this race who's won two tough national elections in a purple swing state. I know how we can win back the 9 million people who voted twice for Obama and once for Trump.

We won't do it with empty promises of free stuff or a billionaire's bank account.

[We will win this race by reaching out to the vast majority of undecided voters who are looking for a unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc05/2103125832/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This fight is far from over, friends, but I crunched the numbers with my finance team and we need to ratchet up our fundraising.

[**I 'm counting on this team to step up and fuel our campaign to victory. I know we can do it with your help. Will you chip in $29 (or whatever you can afford) right now?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba954/134673f2/9e75987/6997bc04/2103125832/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B1_120319_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

Thank you,

Michael

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: could you review this plan?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
We've always prided ourselves on being clear with you about our campaign and what we need to do to protect New Hampshire's vulnerable Democratic Senate seat.
Here's the deal: our fundraising has fallen behind this quarter. Senator Hassan only won by 1,017 votes so filling the gap before the end of the year is critical if we're going to stop the GOP from buying this seat. We've got a plan in place to do just that, but it requires that we raise $8,000 before midnight tomorrow.
**Look, we 're coming specifically to you because you're such a strong supporter. [Maggie has come to count on your help in times like this. Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can before the deadline? No amount is too small -- we're appreciative of anything you can do.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc309/2a380d31/3d1695de/f0e521/3377235544/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE5MTIwM18xZGF5XzZtbyIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20191203_1day_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")**

We've got a plan in place to do just that, but it requires that we raise $8,000 before midnight tomorrow. Look, we 're coming specifically to you because you're such a strong supporter. name: Booker HQ
subject: Tom Steyer is on the December debate stage and Cory isn't
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
The stakes of the race are changing.
| | |
---
| Team, this morning Tom Steyer announced that he has qualified for the December debate. That brings the number of candidates on stage to six -- he'll join Joe Biden, Elizabeth Warren, Bernie Sanders, Pete Buttigieg, and Amy Klobuchar. **His campaign has already spent at least $80.6 million since he launched his run for the White House. We 're not going to be able to match his personal fortune dollar for dollar anytime soon, but we can compete. Will you chip in to help us have a fighting chance?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191203_BHQ_20191203-fr-BHQ-steyer-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

It has been reported that Tom Steyer has spent _**$63.4 million**_ in TV advertising alone so far this election.
This kind of money is not easy to compete with. We don't have the funds to flood the airwaves to spread our message. We rely on supporters like you, chipping in whatever they can, whenever they can.
Our campaign just finalized our December fundraising projections, and we need to raise $840,406 online this month. _But if we raise an additional $500,000, we 'll be able to go up on TV, too._
**[Will you chip in to help us raise the $500,000 we need to launch TV ads and compete with the self-funders in this race?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191203_BHQ_20191203-fr-BHQ-steyer-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Thank you, Senator Harris.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | **It has been an honor to be in this race and on the debate stage with my friend, Senator Kamala Harris.** She made this race better by speaking the truth and fighting for opportunity for all Americans, and she made all of us better candidates by consistently raising the bar. Her passion, experience, and thoughtfulness will be missed from this race. I'm grateful that we will still have her in the United States Senate representing California, and representing all of us as she brings her talent and skills as a prosecutor to hold this administration accountable. **I also want to thank Kamala 's amazing team, who ran a formidable campaign and championed so many communities that often are ignored. ** Throughout this campaign, Kamala was treated very poorly by a media insistent on focusing on one type of candidate. Her campaign and the campaign of others in this race have been held to an unfair standard that needs to end. **To all of Kamala 's supporters, I invite you to join us to continue the fight.** It was our shared values that brought us together in friendship, and I hope those same values inspire her supporters to find a home with this campaign. We can't afford to lose your fearlessness and commitment in this battle - join us. I look forward to continuing this race with all of you. In friendship,
Julian
---
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc880/3eb3e2fc/68cd686d/744d3664/997043981/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc880/3eb3e2fc/68cd686d/744d3663/997043981/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc880/3eb3e2fc/68cd686d/744d3662/997043981/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc880/3eb3e2fc/68cd686d/744d3661/997043981/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc880/3eb3e2fc/68cd686d/744d3660/997043981/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc880/3eb3e2fc/68cd686d/744d366f/997043981/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all&source=20191203_em_fr_b5_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: Doug Collins
subject: Schiff BLEW IT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Congress
body:
We cannot allow this sham impeachment to overturn the 2016 election! | [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53671374:WWF-QAvN5:m:1:1155937413:92CE896E9282D85946DF00E8112472C9:r)
---
Peter,

The Founding Fathers warned against what the Democrats are doing: political impeachment simply because they don't like a president or his politics.

**We cannot allow this sham impeachment to overturn the 2016 election!**
**_As the top Republican on the House Judiciary Committee, I am on the frontlines defending the President against this impeachment sham and will hold the Democrats accountable.**_

**_[Please chip in $25, $50, $100, $250, or more now to show your support for my principled conservative leadership.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53671374:WWF-QAvN5:m:1:1155937413:92CE896E9282D85946DF00E8112472C9:r)**_

Adam Schiff had his chance to make his case, but he blew it (BIG TIME!) and exposed the whole inquiry as nothing more than a political hit job against an effective president.

Since Donald Trump came into office:

* The economy has responded
* Jobs have responded
* America's standing in the world has improved

**_The false narratives are worn out.**_
**_Americans' patience is worn thin.**_
If you agree, **_[stand strong with me right now as I go head to head with Chairman Jerry Nadler.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53671374:WWF-QAvN5:m:1:1155937413:92CE896E9282D85946DF00E8112472C9:r)**_

You and I both know that this impeachment inquiry is **_not**_ about Russia. It is not about a phone call with Ukraine.

This resolution is **_not**_ about the Constitution - it is about control.

It is **_not**_ about fairness - it is about winning at all costs.

It is **_not**_ about finding the facts - it is about Democrats shredding procedure in order to stack the deck against a president they hate.

**_I am President Trump's first line of defense against impeachment, and I am not afraid to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and Jerry Nadler - and hold them ALL accountable.**_

**As a result, I am being attacked and smeared by angry liberals and I need the help of America's top conservatives like you to fight back.**

**_[Chip in what you can to help right now:](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53671374:WWF-QAvN5:m:1:1155937413:92CE896E9282D85946DF00E8112472C9:r)**_

clean_body: We cannot allow this sham impeachment to overturn the 2016 election! | Peter, The Founding Fathers warned against what the Democrats are doing: political impeachment simply because they don't like a president or his politics. We cannot allow this sham impeachment to overturn the 2016 election! As the top Republican on the House Judiciary Committee, I am on the frontlines defending the President against this impeachment sham and will hold the Democrats accountable. Adam Schiff had his chance to make his case, but he blew it (BIG TIME!) and exposed the whole inquiry as nothing more than a political hit job against an effective president. Since Donald Trump came into office: The economy has responded Jobs have responded America's standing in the world has improved The false narratives are worn out. Americans' patience is worn thin. If you agree, You and I both know that this impeachment inquiry is not about Russia. It is not about a phone call with Ukraine. This resolution is not about the Constitution - it is about control. It is not about fairness - it is about winning at all costs. It is not about finding the facts - it is about Democrats shredding procedure in order to stack the deck against a president they hate. I am President Trump's first line of defense against impeachment, and I am not afraid to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff, and Jerry Nadler - and hold them ALL accountable. As a result, I am being attacked and smeared by angry liberals and I need the help of America's top conservatives like you to fight back. The Democrats' brazen behavior is so deeply offensive to me because of my background as a military chaplain, attorney, pastor, and public servant, I have dedicated my life to serving God, my country, the Constitution, and the truth. Those same life experiences have uniquely prepared me for this moment ... Going head to head with Democrats and standing up for the rule of law. What we are facing is unprecedented. These are dark times for America and our democracy. We must stand strong together.** Thank you for your support, Doug Collins | | Paid for by Collins for Congress This email was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

subject: what we want
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Friend,
We got close, but could use a little help getting across the finish line. Sending out fewer fundraisers last month didn’t achieve the results we had hoped for – instead of making more per email we just raised less money.
Today’s political climate of corruption and deceit is a stain on this great nation. Partisan division is out of control. The GOP is doing everything it can to dismantle policy designed to protect the people. Right now it feels like Republicans care more about winning than governing. Americans want healthcare. Americans want jobs that pay living wages. Americans want our government to serve the interests of our citizens – not the President’s vanity. We at the TNDP want all of that too, and we won’t stop working until we get there.
If we can make another $485 today, we’ll be where we want to start December strong – will you help us out right now?
https://secure.ngpvan.com/GJw4NZFDOUaWw74BKdbsOA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/GJw4NZFDOUaWw74BKdbsOA2]

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: It's Official!
body:
Good morning Peter!
Monday morning, I filed to officially be on the ballot for the Congressional seat in District 18. The team and I gathered at the Harris County Democratic Party's office to turn in our petitions and join the ticket.
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6755efb3b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_03_03_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6755efb3b3-32267927
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6755efb3b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_03_03_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6755efb3b3-32267927

http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6755efb3b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_03_03_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6755efb3b3-32267927

We would not be where we are today without your support. Your contributions of time, energy, and donations have kept us moving forward, and allowed us to make an impact on our community.

If you are able, please donate $20 today (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6755efb3b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_03_03_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6755efb3b3-32267927) to help us reach new voters!
Donate $20! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=6755efb3b3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_03_03_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-6755efb3b3-32267927)
Thank you to all of our volunteers and staff for all of your hard work! Campaigns are won by people, and I have had the opportunity to meet and work with some amazing people.
Thank you for everything thus far. We have come a long way, and have a lot of work ahead, but for our district and our nation, we must, we can, and we will do better!

Marc

Friend,
Since Ben announced that he was running for Governor of West Virginia, our team has been overwhelmed by the support and the people lining up beside us to take on West Virginia’s deadbeat billionaire Governor, Jim Justice.
With December starting, we are now counting down to our first fundraising deadline at the end of the month. The race is already heating up. Jim Justice just released a new television ad because he knows he’s on the ropes.
Can you help us get an early start on our December fundraising goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1201]
If we can hit our online fundraising goal early, we will show Jim Justice that his selfish service is no longer welcome in West Virginia. It’s time to boot out the corruption and give the people of West Virginia a governor who will actually work for them.
Will you stand with us and support Ben by donating now to our campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/1201]

name: Mark Warner
subject: The single worst piece of legislation I've seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It was Donald Trump's tax bill that passed in 2017.
|
---
| | | _The New York Times on Trump's Tax Plan:_
_**"A Broken Promise on Taxes"**

What do you think?_

**[TAKE MY SURVEY](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d77f/53d9897e/53ee336c/1c89eec5/729858723/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-taxfairness")**
---
Derek,

The single worst piece of legislation I've seen since I've been in the Senate was Donald Trump's tax bill that passed in 2017, and this latest news only confirms that. This month marks the two-year anniversary of that bill. The result, two years later? Corporate profits are at record highs, but despite Republican promises, it isn't translating into increased investments in American workers.

And get this: The whole tax bill was cooked up in secret. Behind closed doors, special interests helped draft a bill that gave huge cuts to big businesses and the wealthiest Americans while many hardworking Virginians were left out in the cold.

Look, I spent a lot of time in the private sector. I believe in our free enterprise system, but the truth is our economy just isn't working for enough Americans. That's why I was so frustrated that my Republican colleagues completely blew their chance to reform our tax code to make it work better for American workers.

That's one of the reasons it's crucial that we win back the Senate. We need to create a tax code that works for ALL Americans -- not just those that are already doing well. And I want to know what you think, too.

**[Will you take my Tax Fairness Survey now to let me know your thoughts on the Trump tax cuts and how we should reform the tax code in the future?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d77f/53d9897e/53ee336c/1c89eec5/729858723/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-taxfairness")**

Thanks,
Mark Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d77f/53d9897e/53ee336c/1c89eec4/729858723/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191204_s_1_fl__373__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

body:

Peter,

The House of Representatives' sham impeachment inquiry is an act of political revenge for losing the 2016 presidential election. It's as simple as that.

I believe impeaching President Trump over the phone call with the President of Ukraine is insane. _**This is unfair, un-American, and will hurt future presidents of both parties.**_

### These Impeachment Hearings are a SHAM!
Do you agree?

**[Add Your Name⇒](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53676319:sx9NbAvNe:m:1:2202880964:CFE46382AA9E9817A2536A3A7BADE6AC:r)**

**[Peter, by adding your name to our petition, you'll send a clear message to Speaker Nancy Pelosi, Chairman Adam Schiff, and the rest of the impeachment-obsessed Democrats that we continue to stand with President Trump.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53676319:sx9NbAvNe:m:1:2202880964:CFE46382AA9E9817A2536A3A7BADE6AC:r)**

It's because of your activism we've been able to force an impeachment inquiry vote, and we'll be able to unmask the true intentions of House Democrats - **to undo the results of the 2016 election results.**

**[And after you've signed our petition, I need to ask for your support once again.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53676319:sx9NbAvNe:m:1:2202880964:CFE46382AA9E9817A2536A3A7BADE6AC:r)** I am doing all I can to stand with President Trump, but I need your help to ward off the wave of money coming from my opponents. Democrat Senate candidates across the country are raising money hand over fist using impeachment to motivate radical left donors.

**[Please add your name and chip in $5 or more to help!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53676319:sx9NbAvNe:m:1:2202880964:CFE46382AA9E9817A2536A3A7BADE6AC:r) **

Thanks so much for everything you do for our country, Peter.

Lindsey Graham

subject: The impeachment hearings resume today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf2d/30a4f917/5092f504/28cedf5e/3993555576/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1")

| | Steve Chabot has abandoned his constitutional duty to provide oversight of a corrupt president: The month of November has been filled with shameful behavior from Democrats, trying desperately to turn their fantasyland of reversing the 2016 election into reality...all without a shred of evidence or any semblance of facts -- Steve Chabot. We're not sure if Chabot was watching the same hearings we were, but there was plenty of evidence that Donald Trump abused his power and should face serious consequences. Today, the impeachment hearings move to the Judiciary Committee -- where Steve Chabot proudly sits, determined to derail any and all facts that embarrass or condemn Donald Trump. - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - In just a few minutes, Republican Congressman Steve Chabot is about to go on national television and defend Donald Trump in the face of insurmountable evidence against him. [**Will you chip in to help us tell Steve Chabot that his reckless actions have consequences?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+help+us+tell+Steve+C&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1") | | | [Chip in ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1")
---

* * *
**Steve Chabot has abandoned his constitutional duty to provide oversight of a corrupt president:**
[](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1")
We're not sure if Chabot was watching the same hearings we were, but there was plenty of evidence that Donald Trump abused his power and should face serious consequences.
Today, the impeachment hearings move to the Judiciary Committee -- **where Steve Chabot proudly sits, determined to derail any and all facts that embarrass or condemn Donald Trump.**
He's putting party loyalty before the good of our country, and we think it's shameful. Steve Chabot and his extreme colleagues like Devin Nunes will roll over for the president again and again -- **even when it endangers our national security and our democracy.**
That's why we're committed to sending him packing in 2020 -- we want to get our message out to every single voter so they know exactly where Chabot's loyalties lie. **[Will you chip in to help us take him down?](https://go.nikkifosteroh.?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_hearings?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=5+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+help+us+take+him+dow&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191204_Hearings1_U1_X1")**

name: Mark Bergman, Senior Advisor
subject: The real fight has just begun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Thank you for your support over the last year.
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21e9/39260142/4246ab07/62639711/4181270000/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- Thank you for your support over the last year. We accomplished great things together, including Democrats taking control of the Virginia General Assembly for the first time in over two decades. Your outpouring of support over the last year was tremendous. The Way Ahead raised millions of dollars and contributed to great candidates that are now part of the Democratic majority in the House and Senate. Now begins the hard work of delivering on the progressive change we promised in the campaign. We will be re-tooling our efforts toward helping Governor Northam pass important legislation to move Virginia forward including common sense gun safety legislation. The Republicans and the right-wing media are already gearing up to stop the Governor and the new Democratic majority. We can't let them. [**Help us protect the gains we made by rushing a contribution of $25, $50 or $100 so we can support the Governor 's agenda.**](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21e9/39260142/4246ab07/62639710/4181270000/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund") The upcoming General Assembly session in January will be one of the most consequential sessions in a generation and your support will help achieve big things for Virginia's future. \- Mark Bergman, Senior Advisor [**PS --Rush a contribution today so we can help Governor Northam and the Democrats in the General Assembly pass a strong agenda to push Virginia forward. **](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21e9/39260142/4246ab07/62639710/4181270000/VEsF/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund")

name: Cory Booker
subject: Did you see this important note?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
This is one of the most important emails I'll ever send you. The deadline to meet the polling threshold for the December debate is only a week away.
| | |
---
| I wanted to circle back with you, in case you missed our note from yesterday. **Our campaign just launched a fund to help us have enough resources to start airing TV ads. We 're going to need to raise $500,000 to place these expensive ad buys.** We really don't have much time to get these ads up and running. The deadline to meet the polling threshold for the December debate is only _a week away._ **Here 's a link to help us start running TV ads: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Time is of the essence. Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, We're going to continue being radically transparent with you. Our projections are telling us that we'll need to raise $840,406 online this month to keep growing as a campaign. However, we are also only nine days away from the DNC's deadline to qualify for the December debate. That means we have to meet a tough polling threshold to get Cory back on the debate stage in a relatively short period of time. To do that, we'll need to reach as many voters as possible, as quickly as possible. Our best option is to begin running TV ads. If we factor that into our budget, we'll have to raise more than we initially projected. We crunched the numbers and found that if we can bring in an additional $500,000, we'll be able to go up on TV with a sustained ad campaign across multiple media markets. **That 's why we're launching our Get Cory on TV Fund today so we can start reserving TV airtime for our ads. Will you rush a donation right now to help us raise the extra $500,000 we need?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express10&amount=10&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express22&amount=22&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")

---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

We can reach millions of voters and caucus-goers with TV commercials -- far more than through any other means. The challenge for an underdog campaign like ours is that they're just so darn expensive. But with your help and the support of this entire grassroots team, we'll be able to do this.
This is a truly critical stretch for our campaign. Now is one of those times when we really have to give this everything we've got.
**[We know we ask a lot of you, but can you chip in right now so we can start running TV ads?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Thank you for always stepping up during these critical moments.
Booker HQ
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate-adsfund?refcode=em_fr_20191204_CB_20191204-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d85/5fca0d19/78c07df4/291cbab5/2148375365/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d85/5fca0d19/78c07df4/291cbab4/2148375365/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d85/5fca0d19/78c07df4/291cbab3/2148375365/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d85/5fca0d19/78c07df4/291cbab2/2148375365/VEsHBg/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d85/5fca0d19/78c07df4/291cbab1/2148375365/VEsHAQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d85/5fca0d19/78c07df4/291cbab5/2148375365/VEsHAA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: James Mackler
subject: What happened in November →

| | I have great news: This grassroots team's support helped us reach our November fundraising goal! Thank you -- I couldn't do any of this without you. It was both an exciting and turbulent month for our campaign and the country: \- Democrats won tough elections in Kentucky, Louisiana, and Virginia.
\- Our opponents pledged to support President Trump -- not Tennesseans.
\- Leaders in our government have threatened our national security for their own political gain. Last month proved that victory is not only possible for us, it's essential. Tennesseans can't afford more of the same. **I 'm relying on your continued support as we approach the end of 2019 and head into the most important stretch of our campaign. The hurdles are only going to get bigger from here on out, and we need to stick together.** Thank you again for your support, James | | | [Donate](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa1c5/18d6a294/4cd5486b/26d63f67/891080440/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUxOTEyMDQiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibmQifQ%3D%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme191204?refcode=jme191204_nd&recurring=true")

subject: A harsh reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
After a billionaire’s son jumped into our race, we’ve been nervous about how that affects our campaign’s chances. Hearing the news that Kamala was forced out of the race because she couldn’t compete against self-funded billionaires confirms to us a harsh | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GQE/ni0YAA/t.2x9/BpwGEscaSeeWwGPLZomuIg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw9pRfq1SEa60vUXCCJLwq00Gi15VvK3Z8XB3ykxz23OHO6-2Fw1fh1dhUqBOGrgg4O2Qmkshg1RvPe0UFYfjGZDpLPmZjE9MgWm-2FNM-2B62GgtjIEoo4H-2BqGkdVwB3zcHtVYlMjf1uWp89WO9VpVrV4jl03yWaaLmZcXNMc0Wnm6seskUOs6zA7cd4-2BQUzoH5prLlzPqRJStO0-2FilGT92LcRSYbNs782jzm07mrWDehYhgTcfdBQjJcR87Fn6BV3Kw5ha/MQe7)
Friend, You might have heard that yesterday Kamala Harris dropped out of the presidential race. This is what she said in her announcement email:
> **_"My campaign for president simply doesn’t have the financial resources we need to continue. I’m not a billionaire. I can’t fund my own campaign. And as the campaign has gone on, it’s become harder and harder to raise the money we need to compete."_**
Friend, we feel that same pressure. **After a billionaire’s son jumped into our race, we’ve been concerned about how that affects our campaign’s chances.** [****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GQE/ni0YAA/t.2x9/BpwGEscaSeeWwGPLZomuIg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw9pRfq1SEa60vUXCCJLwq00Gi15VvK3Z8XB3ykxz23OFZpHCVe5WA3tOiw-2B4-2BGZqtnc8mXnUlDVNF-2BkLCgnLaiH0F30kg0M3wTFDA9oqYgI0oTM7L5azvG27huW3n9nRPdSCkGQJDz1Et-2BaEije4IJ3x4ax6-2FtP6YByA2g9yOBfiBSJbgF1yhgIwLfIXQwXuXVpoyt2v7fVmyaXi-2F2QrTXaHVJvvxsEDJoA-2B5-2Bvc3-2FhXlcjW4jcQbdOr-2BOMt4gMNT/_njl)Hearing the news that Kamala was forced out of the race because she couldn’t compete against self-funded billionaires confirms to us a harsh reality.**[We need to take our grassroots fundraising to the next level if we want to stay competitive in this race. Will you chip in $5 to our campaign today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GQE/ni0YAA/t.2x9/BpwGEscaSeeWwGPLZomuIg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw9pRfq1SEa60vUXCCJLwq00Gi15VvK3Z8XB3ykxz23OEafozZWJxcpHwiH27ZpnypFipPvyyPvZlsz24fxCoI9GjORZYTXONCORlxH55irbKw7XXT16DuwI2e0jupCQ8q0cMrs2-2FZ4YbTg2SL-2F3VEgz8AqJS6fgohdiC5KHFZtbYRfDKvOd9pFgnDuS8aUxMiUFPanr91FAtYrpVmw2YMPQjQeo1w-2FiN8GDAyCoeOV4BAPr7opywLJiPwVoPtJhim/jqrt)**____[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GQE/ni0YAA/t.2x9/BpwGEscaSeeWwGPLZomuIg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw9pRfq1SEa60vUXCCJLwq00Gi15VvK3Z8XB3ykxz23OFff9eS4-2BWyohsZA9b2c09tKrfubK7t6-2B836j3SH0nU5qZBcnc4uPN8q8o-2BgAJQydsQTk1ob-2FH-2BJ7ZKply4MiMr2yd1tOacGONi0qqa4LeBiBDRjObBa1mgoSu-2FbUIbbEvOyww9Sh2j2rxvbEWubKq42SgMS0uro1XxW9eFR-2BryIgagC02o0g1BXirgJN0sP0HUNTlkwPinu7Eu3wQfocXf/SgTY)**_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GQE/ni0YAA/t.2x9/BpwGEscaSeeWwGPLZomuIg/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw9pRfq1SEa60vUXCCJLwq00Gi15VvK3Z8XB3ykxz23OGzcTwvez17T-2F1HmYTsz-2FqtYZ-2BiujDt1SvUu-2FvoXrOtwjp-2Fcnwcp67KsdET8QHwDKZZw5FHhgcrhtpLOS4Mui6xaLHuokAl5Gtk6z41-2FucrHiRNoosRY8IuO0VaX4d54MDJd8yqN9fpyTkc57z2mQb9cVpOShnl3xTZE6X-2Fl6Hmq124wLO1n-2FVAc1CIJeFE3LcUEfRK3WCziYjLTVyoRxEo/v1Sf)_** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GQE/ni0YAA/t.2x9/BpwGEscaSeeWwGPLZomuIg/h5/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3Hzqw9pRfq1SEa60vUXCCJLwq09oWO3VOeioY6j7Vqm-2FymZuCqA19sVYjzHSMxcc00zzPGKlAOasEZmacoBueEJJyIHzQ-2BcBtVge0y9TdzekcjVUFnHZCidHLgL-2BjzNiEIGab9HzanesEUs0sM2cnhq5y9T0MmcYrw93nV2BcYL7Odkyvy0170c5cU5tiLgobMulp8b8vXE-2BoV9Cyt-2FhZKCS-2F1BcZjHCoYbhkTjdbFqmzSO1Ll6oCpDKkksHYHr-2Fi67hr/IN5h) **Billionaires shouldn’t be able to buy an election. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: House Intel committee releases bombshell impeachment report
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Yesterday, the House Intel committee released its report on impeachment, and it did not disappoint. The report includes previously unseen call records from Rudy Giuliani and Devin Nunes (the ranking GOP member of the Intel committee and the face of the Republican opposition to impeachment) highlighting their connections to the extortion efforts. Today marks a momentous day \-- the impeachment inquiry has moved from a preliminary inquiry in the House Intelligence Committee to a full-blown hearing in the Judiciary Committee. Trump was given the opportunity to participate in the hearings today and have lawyers present, but instead, he's decided to pout like a child, hide in the corner, and go on Twitter. Last month, we witnessed courageous witnesses like Fiona Hill, Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman, and former ambassador Marie Yovanovitch stand up for the truth and for the America we believe in. Even Gordon Sondland, Trump mega-donor and current E.U. ambassador, sang like a bird in his testimony, revealing both that he was following orders from the president to pressure Ukraine AND that V.P. Mike Pence and Secretary of State Mike Pompeo were in on it, exposing the rot festering in our highest office. But after all this, Trump will probably still be on the ballot in 2020, so we need EVERY Democrat to step up. In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home, handing the election and the future over to a tyrannical, chaotic Cheeto and his GOP lackeys like Mitch McConnell. If we're not careful, this could happen again in 2020. Especially because it's difficult to beat a sitting president, no matter who it is. If you're ready to be a part of the solution and you want to fix the divisions, hate, and corruption that's currently in our government, we need your support now. [**Anything you can give, even just $5, will go a long way toward beating Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all their corrupt enablers. Can you donate today?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc84/6e9863e8/16f5e1a9/1db0bd87/3555372343/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191204a.ND&refcode2=v9BIGC8JRxm93QmJPwWX") Thank you for standing with us in this fight. We couldn't do it without the amazing support of people like you. The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc84/6e9863e8/16f5e1a9/1db0bd87/3555372343/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191204a.ND&refcode2=v9BIGC8JRxm93QmJPwWX")
---
|
---

In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home, handing the election and the future over to a tyrannical, chaotic Cheeto and his GOP lackeys like Mitch McConnell. If we're not careful, this could happen again in 2020. Especially because it's difficult to beat a sitting president, no matter who it is. If you're ready to be a part of the solution and you want to fix the divisions, hate, and corruption that's currently in our government, we need your support now. "" Thank you for standing with us in this fight. We couldn't do it without the amazing support of people like you. The WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

subject: my heart just dropped
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | **CONFIRMED: Trump deploying dozens of staff to flip New Mexico red -- threatening that the "the cavalry" is coming. **[**_I will not allow Trump to flip this state and sabotage our shot to win the Senate -- even if it 's the last thing I do. I need 501 gifts before midnight to launch an IMMEDIATE defense, WIN my race, and HOLD this state for Democrats. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191204_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250") I just received an emergency phone call that made my heart drop. Donald Trump is sending an unprecedented army of resources to our state. He knows we're on the verge of FLIPPING his entire Republican Senate. And he knows if Democrats lose my race, our historic shot to win the Senate will be over. That's why his campaign just announced they are sending dozens of staff to New Mexico to FLIP this state. **I 'm launching an IMMEDIATE response. I need 501 Democrats to step up to fund it.** Will you rush $5 before midnight to beat back Trump's attacks and HOLD this critical Senate seat for Democrats? | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191204_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d5/18e32a7f/5077cda4/7b22ac11/3444560201/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d5/18e32a7f/5077cda4/7b22ac16/3444560201/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d5/18e32a7f/5077cda4/7b22ac17/3444560201/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d5/18e32a7f/5077cda4/7b22ac14/3444560201/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d5/18e32a7f/5077cda4/7b22ac15/3444560201/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b7d5/18e32a7f/5077cda4/7b22ac0a/3444560201/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

name: Team Yang
subject: Fact: We still haven’t qualified for the December debate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We need you to help us get there.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4120%2E377263%2ELMbqn3) Yang Gang --

**We’re less than two months out from the Iowa caucus and only 10 days from the DNC’s December debate qualifying deadline.

The fact:**
We still haven’t qualified for the debate.

**The solution:**
Give our Iowa field organizing program the budget to succeed and get the final poll we need to get on the Los Angeles debate stage.

**[To continue support in Iowa and get the last poll needed for the December debate stage, we need your support to make it to the finish line. Can you make a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18747?t=5&akid=4120%2E377263%2ELMbqn3)

Andrew Yang wasn’t supposed to get this far. The Yang Gang said otherwise. **

We’ve outlasted candidates that were supposed to be frontrunners, and we’re in a position in this race that the establishment and media thought was impossible. And with this last poll on the line, we can’t stop now.

Not even a little bit.

**[We need you to chip in today so we can continue supporting our Iowa field organizing program, making it possible for Andrew to get to the December debate stage. Can you contribute $10 now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18747?t=13&akid=4120%2E377263%2ELMbqn3)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18747?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4120%2E377263%2ELMbqn3)

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18747?t=6&akid=4120%2E377263%2ELMbqn3)
