* Voted to ALLOW giant insurance companies to deny coverage for pre-existing conditions and voted AGAINST lowering prescription drug costs.
* Applauded when Congress passed a trillion dollar taxpayer giveaway for Wall Street executives and billionaires.
* Backed NRA lobbyists against basic gun safety measures like universal background checks.

[**Wendy 's not taking a dime from corporate PACs or federally registered lobbyists, because she's running to be a voice for people like US. If you're ready to take on the real swamp, pitch in to help our grassroots campaign unseat Chip Roy in 2020!**](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_unseatchiproy?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191204_TakeOnTheSwamp_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=3+-+Wendyrsquos+not+taking+a+dime+from+corpo&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191204_TakeOnTheSwamp_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191204_TakeOnTheSwamp_U1_X1") | | | [Chip In 2 Get Chip Out](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dav_monthly_unseatchiproy?refcode=DAV_EM_FR_191204_TakeOnTheSwamp_U1_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&city=Englewood&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=wendyforcongress&utm_content=4+-+Chip+In+2+Get+Chip+Out&utm_campaign=DAV_EM_FR_191204_TakeOnTheSwamp_U1_X1&source=DAV_EM_FR_191204_TakeOnTheSwamp_U1_X1")

Team Wendy

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc882/3eb3e2fc/68d28a97/744d305b/308317336/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**

**[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f94/4bef7a87/6b9c2715/287fe628/534338799/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDQtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/happy-birthday-sara?source=em191204-full")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Schiff Impeachment Report Offers Nothing But Predetermined Conclusion
body:
"Funny: The dueling Republican and Democratic reports on the findings of the House Intelligence Committee hearings have one big thing in common..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd8073e0fd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Schiff Impeachment Report Offers Nothing But Predetermined Conclusion**

“Funny: The dueling Republican and Democratic reports on the findings of the House Intelligence Committee hearings have one big thing in common: Neither offers hard evidence that President Trump committed a single impeachable offense. Yes, Rep. Adam Schiff, who helmed the hearings, says otherwise. But he’s been seeing ‘more than circumstantial evidence’ against Trump for three years now, since the early days of the ‘collusion’ probe,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.

“The GOP report accurately noted that Schiff only created a ‘misleading public narrative’ based on ‘hearsay, presumption and emotion’: Not one witness testified to the clear ‘quid pro quo’ that Democrats advertised would be exposed, nor to the ‘bribery’ they later talked of.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d8b1a45f0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “House Democrats do not seem to grasp that they cannot legitimize such an illegitimate process halfway through. This process has been unfair for the president and the Republicans from the start, with Democrats ignoring the historical precedents outlined in the Clinton and Nixon impeachments. When it comes to Trump, Democrats have created a whole new set of rules,” Rep. Debbie Lesko (R-AZ) writes in [**_USA Today_**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5de005fd5e&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.usatoday.com/story/opinion/2019/12/03/impeachment-hearing-president-donald-trump-made-right-decision-editorials-debates/2602028001/").
---
|
---
| “‘No one is above the law,’ Speaker Nancy Pelosi insists. Now get ready for the switch: At the hearing, Democrats and their hand-picked legal experts will argue that a president can be impeached even if he hasn’t broken a law. Suddenly, impeachment isn’t about upholding the rule of law. Why the switch? Because Dems don’t have the goods to show Trump has committed a crime,” Betsy McCaughey writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=396a8db8fa&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Most Americans have no idea what a health care service costs before they get it. If we expect to lower health care costs, that must change.” That’s why in June, President Trump signed an order to eliminate barriers to price and quality transparency to protect American patients, CMS Administrator Seema Verma writes in the [_Chicago Tribune_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=51133bc051&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Between impeachment, all the hearings and testimonies which have essentially turned Congress into a TV courtroom, and House Speaker Nancy Pelosi’s stall tactics which have prevented Congress from taking up key priorities, partisan politics has once again taken over, and things in Washington are not getting done”—including the important U.S.–Mexico–Canada trade deal to modernize NAFTA, writes Sarah Chamberlain, CEO of the Republican Main Street Partnership, in [**_The Washington Times_**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d165a912f6&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2019/dec/3/main-street-counts-on-trade-with-mexico-and-canada/").
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dca135b30d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=14a6eff941&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e762f06662)

subject: Tell Congress to stand up to Trump and protect DACA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|

| | Hello Peter, The Trump administration has continued its campaign against immigrants unabated by the impeachment inquiry. The DACA program, which protects DREAMers from deportation, is before the Supreme Court, and Trump's lawyers made it clear they intend to end the program and deport nearly a million people one way or another. This drastic step would devastate communities across the country and hurt those who are simply trying to live their lives in the only country they've known. They are our neighbors, friends, and family members. They are our teachers, co-workers, and strangers on the street worthy of safe and happy lives. [**Congress has the ability to stop this by passing legislation guaranteeing the continuation of the program, but the GOP is so caught up in Trump 's racism, xenophobia, and political backstabbing that they can't see the bigger picture. Add your name to ours and call on Congress to protect DREAMers now!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc85/6e9863e8/16f7364e/1db0bc74/2263505599/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/dreamers-trump/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC") Thank you for standing with us, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc85/6e9863e8/16f7364e/1db0bc74/2263505599/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.paction.us/dreamers-trump/when_democrats_turn_out_PAC")

Iowa is the first test. But then we have dozens of states after that.

This race is going to heat up fast. And while moderates continue to drop out, we've got to keep building and growing the movement that can make it all the way. We need to have the resources for Iowa and beyond.

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: Why do our districts look so funny?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12536482/129036720/853421515?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RhNDVhYy1mNTE2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gdVe0ryPYYOGQgeYU3Mg6nzFiv5e18_eWBSYyEW1yc=&emci=60cabf08-f416-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=47da45ac-f516-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Peter,
In the 2018 Texas Congressional elections, Democrats received 47% of the votes and Republicans received 53%. If the 36 congressional seats in Texas were split proportionately then there would be 19 Republican representatives and 17 Democrats - yet we somehow ended up with 23 Republicans and 13 Democrats.
How? **Gerrymandering - when a political group manipulates an electoral map to gain an unfair advantage.**
[_**Join me in calling on Congress to end the ridiculous practice of gerrymandering today >> **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12536484/129036727/-1279509791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0N2RhNDVhYy1mNTE2LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-gdVe0ryPYYOGQgeYU3Mg6nzFiv5e18_eWBSYyEW1yc=&emci=60cabf08-f416-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=47da45ac-f516-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Just look at the funky shape of our district:

clean_body: Peter, In the 2018 Texas Congressional elections, Democrats received 47% of the votes and Republicans received 53%. If the 36 congressional seats in Texas were split proportionately then there would be 19 Republican representatives and 17 Democrats - yet we somehow ended up with 23 Republicans and 13 Democrats. How? Gerrymandering - when a political group manipulates an electoral map to gain an unfair advantage. Just look at the funky shape of our district: Our district, like so many others across the country, has been reshaped to give Republicans an advantage. This issue is too important to ignore - we have to act now. ** Thank you for all that you do, Elisa Cardnell ** Do you follow us on and ? Join us there to see more campaign updates! Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

There are also huge consequences if Senator Hassan's fundraising falls short. Her seat is one of the most competitive in the country and if she can't raise the funds to compete, we hand this seat back to Trump's Republican party.

body:
Iowans and Americans are hurting because of the Democrats' inaction. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523925?e=90fad69796)

| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=19c18899d4&e=90fad69796)

---
| Peter, The Democrats are pushing forward with their ridiculous impeachment charade against President Trump today. Meanwhile, millions of Iowans and Americans are suffering because of this nonsense.

We still haven't secured the border.

We still haven't made President Trump's middle-class tax cuts permanent.

We still haven't fixed healthcare.

Just to name a few.

Instead of working on the issues that matter to everyday Americans, Democrats have given in to their far-left base and are obsessed with overturning the 2016 election results.

That's why conservatives have to take back the House in 2020. Democrats had their chance to deliver for the American people and they blew it. Conservatives, united with President Trump, will get the job done.

Districts like IA-02 are the key to flipping the House in 2020, and the left knows that. They're going to pour millions into this district to keep it blue and keep the whole House blue, but we can stop them. This campaign will be powered by "We, the People."

[**Will you donate just $3 to help us fight the left's radicalism and deliver solutions for the American people?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ee1eaa8bcc&e=90fad69796)

This is a conservative district that voted for the president by 5 points in 2016, and we'll vote Republican for the House in 2020 if we marshal the resources to fight. We need the grassroots to rise up and stand with us.

[**Please donate $3 or whatever you can to help us counter the liberal-left's millions today.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b4c959792b&e=90fad69796)

Thank you so much!

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=fe00d38d70&e=90fad69796)

name: Michigan Senate Update
subject: Donald Trump and Mike Pence are working hard to defeat Gary Peters in Michigan:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
And if Republicans win here in Michigan, Democrats will throw away our ONLY chance at taking back the Senate.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa1/5721a3ed/71d2c945/efaa287/103326532/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
Friends - Donald Trump, Mike Pence and national Republicans are already working hard to defeat Gary Peters in Michigan.

**And if Republicans win here in Michigan, Democrats will throw away our ONLY chance at taking back the Senate.**
That's why Vice President Mike Pence and Sarah Huckabee Sanders are in Michigan RIGHT NOW actively campaigning to turn Michigan red - helping Gary's opponent, the handpicked candidate of Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.
And on top of that, out-of-state, conservative billionaires have spent nearly $1 million, all to help buy Michigan's Senate. **All that dark money has caused the polls to shift.**

****Now, polling is showing Gary _TIED_ with his extremist opponent. With CBS reporting that Senate control is riding on what happens here in Michigan, our fundraising is falling short.****

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Nate Silver agrees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | Friend, The truth is not always politically convenient. When I said that the Democrats should examine whether or not it's wise that a party that owes its national victories in large part to voters of color begin their primary process in two states whose diversity doesn't reflect the primary electorate as a whole - there was backlash. But yesterday, Nate Silver joined a growing number of voices in agreement: | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d3252/1257540585/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---

[If you agree, contribute today. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d3251/1257540585/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+If+you+agree+contribute+today+gtgt&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all")

I intend to compete for every vote in Iowa and New Hampshire, and I appreciate the caucus-goers who dedicate themselves to the primary process.

Additionally, with the news of Senator Harris dropping out of the race, there are currently no candidates of color who have met the DNC's requirements to qualify for the next debate.

**This process needs to be fixed. **

I'm close to hitting the donor threshold to qualify for the December debate.

[Over the last 24 hours, our campaign is gaining incredible steam, and we need you to help us cross that threshold. Help me continue to build a campaign that can win. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d3250/1257540585/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=3+-+Over+the+last+24+hours+our+campaign+is+g&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all")

Let's win,
Julian

| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d325f/1257540585/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d325e/1257540585/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d325d/1257540585/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.instagram.com/juliancastrotx/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all")
---
| | [](julianforthefuture.com)
---
| | Paid for by Julian for the Future
---
| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d325c/1257540585/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d325b/1257540585/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc883/3eb3e2fc/68d89c17/744d325a/1257540585/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191204_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: Cory wrote to you yesterday. Did you miss it?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Our party shouldn't be making it easier for billionaires to gain access to the debate stage while qualified candidates of color are being shut out.
| | |
---
| Team, we wanted to make sure you saw Cory's note below. Our party shouldn't be making it easier for billionaires to gain access to the debate stage while qualified candidates of color are being shut out. **[If you believe that Cory deserves to be on that stage in two weeks, donate here to help make it happen.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191204_BHQ_20191204-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Booker HQ _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_
Team, I'll get right to the point: Six candidates currently in the race are qualified for the DNC's December debate. But as it stands now, after starting with the most diverse presidential field in our nation's history, you might not see our party's diversity reflected on that stage. **Not a single one of the candidates who have qualified for the December debate is a person of color. And that 's a shame.** **These thresholds have had the effect of denying candidates of color access to the debate stage while paving the way for billionaires who are inflating their support through massive ad buys.[I'm asking for your donation right now to help me qualify for the December debate by placing ads in the early states.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191204_BHQ_20191204-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This race is still far from decided. No one knows who we will choose as our party's nominee in Milwaukee next July. But it would be unacceptable if our final choices did not reflect the rich diversity of our party. **[We need a debate stage that fully reflects the Democratic Party, not one limited to candidates with massive donor bases and billionaires who are able to buy their way onto the debate stage. Please donate to my campaign to help me qualify for the next debate.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191204_BHQ_20191204-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Put me on that debate stage and I'll demonstrate that I can, and I have, united moderate and progressive Democrats. I'll demonstrate that I can, and I have, excited and engaged Black voters, the most loyal constituency of our party. And I'll demonstrate that I am the only person in this race who can rebuild the coalition that elected President Obama that we need in order to defeat Donald Trump. We are the party of diversity. We are the party of inclusion. Let's start acting like it. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191204_BHQ_20191204-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d81/5fca0d19/78cb6a4a/291cb877/3327416309/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d81/5fca0d19/78cb6a4a/291cb876/3327416309/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d81/5fca0d19/78cb6a4a/291cb875/3327416309/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d81/5fca0d19/78cb6a4a/291cb874/3327416309/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d81/5fca0d19/78cb6a4a/291cb873/3327416309/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d81/5fca0d19/78cb6a4a/291cb877/3327416309/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Peter —

Last month, we asked for 5,000 Democratic supporters to sign our petition to demand Kevin McCarthy and Congress vote to IMPEACH Trump.

[**Unfortunately, it doesn’t appear that you signed. Was that a mistake, Peter? body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
At today's impeachment hearing, I don't think I made any friends while exposing the Democrats' witnesses for who they are: anti-Trump, liberal, academic elitists.
Did you see this?
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEXzmf_6mdDrUtSNvxSIMCyf4DpO6Umb-tDMDXdzDQxEb6qm_g42rZFUuY3PuZfPov-DZvikPVW7m0S2kE22QNlYOTwORACp-amhDrp_OxUhncV4N5Ryk7RZg3ZLDXNbprALw89T6Ppy2aLZjf-QdHGspRx0U48CVGt4ry9lFU9_O-JkS3ENMQ==&c=BeIeor1DGvjoDlt7clE7rWkqURCXdFY07RJER2yV-M-voIaWnv6mig==&ch=RVr113vEm_dKrmBsAI_q2buYILHvSARf9O-B-eDkOcbT7Z1h6lxJBQ==)
---
| While they were on the stand attacking our President's son and wasting taxpayer dollars, today's witnesses were making a complete mockery of the impeachment process.
---
| | | [DON'T WAIT. HELP DEFEND THE PRESIDENT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEXzmf_6mdDrUtSNvxSIMCyf4DpO6Umb-tDMDXdzDQxEb6qm_g42rZFUuY3PuZfP85e8c4pj40fwYdK3rou1oWzmbjkqzRmqdM1FSbMFBVC1zlhsZk12ghSlzS-mh2cGOVNA8Lco8_lMAE-ZURhZ9zjS0k79duKVf3_Fv4Dghzqr6ZQO6JD5Hw==&c=BeIeor1DGvjoDlt7clE7rWkqURCXdFY07RJER2yV-M-voIaWnv6mig==&ch=RVr113vEm_dKrmBsAI_q2buYILHvSARf9O-B-eDkOcbT7Z1h6lxJBQ==)
---
| On top of this, I asked the witnesses to raise their hands if they had any personal knowledge of a single material fact in the Schiff Report. There were no hands raised, and we are still waiting on Schiff to release his report to the American people. If the radical left can't interrupt, disrupt, or silence conservatives, withholding information is their next move.
All that we are asking for is a fair process, and it's clear that the Democrats are not willing to comply. Despite this, I will not stop until the American people know the truth, and President Trump is past this impeachment nightmare. Join me in the fight to defend our President!

---
| | | [JOIN THE OFFICIAL PRESIDENT TRUMP IMPEACHMENT DEFENSE FUND](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JEXzmf_6mdDrUtSNvxSIMCyf4DpO6Umb-tDMDXdzDQxEb6qm_g42rZFUuY3PuZfP85e8c4pj40fwYdK3rou1oWzmbjkqzRmqdM1FSbMFBVC1zlhsZk12ghSlzS-mh2cGOVNA8Lco8_lMAE-ZURhZ9zjS0k79duKVf3_Fv4Dghzqr6ZQO6JD5Hw==&c=BeIeor1DGvjoDlt7clE7rWkqURCXdFY07RJER2yV-M-voIaWnv6mig==&ch=RVr113vEm_dKrmBsAI_q2buYILHvSARf9O-B-eDkOcbT7Z1h6lxJBQ==)
---
| |
---
| God Bless President Trump,
---
|

| Matt Gaetz
[P.S. body:
Peter,
Our campaign has been gaining momentum, and we need your help to keep it that way! We are growing in support, but we still need help reaching out to voters and potential volunteers and donors. Please commit to a block walk (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/168346/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=3be8b7bf06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_04_06_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-3be8b7bf06-32267927) this Saturday to help us inform people about Marc and his upcoming election!

Where? Carmichael Elementary School
When? Saturday, December 7th, 2019 @ 9:00 A.M.
Join us this weekend! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/168346/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=3be8b7bf06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_04_06_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-3be8b7bf06-32267927)

(https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/167090/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=3be8b7bf06-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_04_06_47&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-3be8b7bf06-32267927)

Marc

name: MJ Hegar
subject: my oath
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Senator Cornyn and I took the same oath, but only one of us is taking it seriously.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8d/1313277111/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

I took an oath as a member of the United States Air Force to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. So did John Cornyn when he became Senator nearly two decades ago.

That means that Sen. Cornyn has a constitutional duty to put our country over political party, hear out the facts, and make a well-reasoned decision as to whether the allegations that the president abused his power for political gain warrant impeachment. Instead, here's what Sen. Cornyn is saying _before seeing any evidence in the Senate._ | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8c/1313277111/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191204nd__586__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[**Donate to defeat Senator Cornyn >>**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8c/1313277111/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191204nd__586__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
**[Sen. Cornyn is violating his oath of office. Will you pitch in to help me defeat him next November?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8c/1313277111/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191204nd__586__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

As a combat veteran, it is unconscionable to me that a senator would flat-out reject his oath. Yet Sen. Cornyn has done just that, day after day, since the impeachment inquiry began.

As _The Washington Post_ reported, Sen. Cornyn has vowed not to pay attention to the proceedings. And he tried to use the situation to deflect from his total lack of legislative accomplishments for Texans, going **so far as to shift the blame to the American people.** Take a look:
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8c/1313277111/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191204nd__586__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[Donate to help defeat Sen. Cornyn>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8c/1313277111/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191204nd__586__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Sen. Cornyn has been Mitch McConnell's right-hand man in burying legislation on critical issues -- like universal background checks, lower prescription drug prices, and improved election security -- in Mitch McConnell's legislative graveyard. We won't let him hide from his record of putting his D.C. bosses and the special interests over Texans.

**I took an oath to defend our Constitution when I served in our military. So did John Cornyn when he became Senator. He is violating his oath.**

Sen. Cornyn has forgotten about the people and the Constitution he serves. It's time we send him home. **[Will you pitch in to help me defeat him?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8c/1313277111/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191204nd__586__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,

MJ Hegar

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890958/7f51f7bc/4bbad960/4ef08d8c/1313277111/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oath?refcode=email_20191204nd__586__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|

---
| |
---
| | **The clock is ticking. I hope I can count on you!**
Please join me on December 13th for a celebration of the Christmas season. If you have already RSVP'd, please disregard this reminder.

Come in your festive holiday attire for an evening with fellow conservatives from across Fort Bend, Brazoria, and Harris counties!
**Bring a toy to donate to Toys for Tots Fort Bend County to bring Christmas joy to children in our community this holiday season.**
---
|
---
| Learn more about my campaign, get involved, and share a fun evening with like-minded patriots from across the area.
[**Please RSVP**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=451ceb1093&e=01c99b7fbd)[**by December 11 if you are able to join me**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=736d1459b7&e=01c99b7fbd)
**When:**
Friday, December 13th from 6:00 - 7:30 pm

**Location:**
Kathaleen Wall for Congress Campaign Office
8410 Highway 90 A, Ste 160 in Sugar Land

I look forward to seeing you there!

Kathaleen

Peter Willis , **Today is Kevin 's birthday, and I am hoping to get your help!** He's been working hard in Washington over the past year to represent our shared values, and I'd love to show him how much we appreciate him. [**Will you join us in wishing Kevin a happy birthday by chipping in a donation to the campaign and signing our virtual card? Make a contribution now!**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/2I56jno892cLW2vrtX5pukVw/Z0W55KhWnaGOGTH892nAi1QQ) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/KJ0WcH7637oL3892L5MSuDlzmQ/2I56jno892cLW2vrtX5pukVw/Z0W55KhWnaGOGTH892nAi1QQ) It would mean the world to Kevin to see your name on a list of his supporters. name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Polluters. Deniers. Drillers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c44a/6cd27893/52d9a0ba/1587a058/476573380/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | **It's official: Donald Trump has withdrawn the United States from the Paris Climate Agreement.** As the _Washington Post_ painfully notes, _it's "a move that will leave the world's second-largest emitter of greenhouse gases as the only nation to abandon the global effort to combat climate change."_ Shameful. Utterly, utterly shameful. Not that we should be surprised.**Donald Trump and his administration has long shunned science, reason, and decency when it comes to protecting our environment.**
* Donald Trump packed the EPA with friends of polluters and deniers of climate science.

* They want to open our coastal waters to endless oil drilling.

* Trump has opened up hundreds of thousands of acres of federal land for oil and gas development.

* They turned their backs on Puerto Rico after the devastation of Hurricane Maria.

* They threatened to pull federal aid from California as massive fires -- exacerbated by climate chaos -- ravaged communities there.

* They're going to court to try to roll back stricter automobile pollution standards (a move many in the auto industry don't even want).

I can go on and on. **Donald Trump's presidency is a disaster for many reasons. His willful, painful ignorance when it comes to our environment and the survival of our planet must always be challenged.** In 2020, we will fight back. We will win. And we will get America back on track to tackle the climate crisis. Onward! **_Jeff_** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c44a/6cd27893/52d9a0ba/1587a059/476573380/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-12-04-paris&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c44a/6cd27893/52d9a0ba/1587a056/476573380/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-12-04-paris&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c44a/6cd27893/52d9a0ba/1587a057/476573380/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-12-04-paris&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c44a/6cd27893/52d9a0ba/1587a054/476573380/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-12-04-paris&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: GOP is trying to trick AZ voters again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Arizona GOP Senator Martha McSally is known for being deceptive with voters \-- she's been caught committing **_numerous_** campaign finance law violations, and when she lost her election to Kyrsten Sinema, she was appointed instead of elected to the Senate. She even campaigned to voters that she was a moderate Republican, but her 95% Trump voting record and multiple campaign rallies with him say otherwise. Now, she's trying to distance herself from him by not taking an honorary position in his re-election committee \-- but it's just another McSally deception. She has chosen to continue down the hyper-partisan, Trump-supporting path that she claims she is not on. She isn't trying to bridge gaps with her colleagues \-- she's busy trying to shield Trump. Fortunately, Arizona voters are noticing \-- Democrat Mark Kelly is up 47 to 45 against McSally. _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have all placed the Arizona race firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. We can win this. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws again, to win. We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Do you support Martha McSally for U.S. Senate?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc87/6e9863e8/16f165e4/1db0bc58/1222065995/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ZHsL9Mx8") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc87/6e9863e8/16f165e4/1db0bc58/1222065995/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/ZHsL9Mx8") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc87/6e9863e8/16f165e4/1db0bc5f/1222065995/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyvmcsally-nd?refcode=OUT20191204c.ND&refcode2=xnK0juGwfIVPKJ7Fvgfb")
---

body:

[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=1) Team — We made the primary ballot in seven states. Now our team is putting the pieces in place to make the ballot in eleven other states by the end of the year. **_But with 38 states still to go, we need your help to finish the job we started._** [**Can you support our ballot access fund with a contribution today?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=2) | [CONTRIBUTE TO THE BALLOT ACCESS FUND ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=3)
---
\---- Forwarded message ----
**From** : Bill Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : October 18, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=4)
Hey Team — Don’t know if you saw Natalie’s email on Sunday, but we have some good news and some bad news over here.
**The good news:** we’re officially on the primary ballot in six states! In fact, by the end of this week, we’ll have submitted paperwork to appear on the primary ballot in six more states as well.
**The bad news:** we’re not done yet... there are still a handful of ballots to get on, and our team is working around the clock to submit the paperwork before the various deadlines (let alone keep track of them all!).
Not only are these deadlines coming up fast, but so are the primaries. And with President Trump’s massive war chest giving him the cash to blast his message across your social media feeds and airwaves, we’re doing everything we can to continue _to raise money and spend it smarter._
That’s why we need your help. _We’re going to keep pushing and challenging President Trump in all 50 states, and**[we need you in the fight.](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=5)**_
[CHIP IN NOW ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=6)
---
As we get closer to the December ballot deadlines, your continued support is critical.
Time and again, you’ve come through for us. But this is important, and we’re asking for your help once more.
**[Can we count on you to chip in $50 to help us fund our ballot access operations?](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=7)**
| [SUPPORT THE BALLOT ACCESS FUND ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23RnSat4TMYqqOIv68rWpj3Sofav5d_Pvs2wIP4cfL1fveMP4FzqB00xmSC6Nv-PPA&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=8)
---
Thank you for all you do,
Team Weld
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=9).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=10) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191204fr&n=11).

name: Team Turner
subject: Adam Schiff releases partisan impeachment report!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS FOR TURNER
body:
This message contains graphics. If you do not see the graphics, [click here to view](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/MailView?ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Today, Jerry Nadler and his Judiciary Committee start the next phase of impeachment, and we here at Team Turner believe we are going to see more of the same out of this committee.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=25&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[ ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
Congress returns from Thanksgiving recess and wouldn't you know it, Adam Schiff doesn't skip a beat. [_**With yesterday 's release of the Schiff Report, this partisan march towards impeachment continues! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Today, Jerry Nadler and his Judiciary Committee start the next phase of impeachment, and we here at Team Turner believe we are going to see more of the same out of this committee.
As a leader holding Schiff and Nancy Pelosi accountable, Mike Turner did his job by asking the tough questions of Schiff's star witnesses. [_**Do you know what he found?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0) That almost none of these individuals had any direct contact with President Trump!
Schiff's biased report is more evidence that Pelosi's party's only agenda in Congress is to impeach Donald Trump. [_**The partisan politics in Congress needs to end**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0).
Mike has been holding Schiff accountable throughout this first phase of impeachment and he has no plans to stop! [_**Will you help Mike hold Schiff accountable?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Mike is fighting for you to get Congress back on track. [_**Chip in to aid Mike 's efforts today! It's time to end this partisan impeachment process! **_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**[Rush in a $35 contribution->](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=26&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Rush in a $45 contribution ->](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Rush in a $65 contribution ->](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Rush in a $100 contribution -> ](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDEyNjE0NjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MDM3ODM3MwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**_
We need you now! Help Mike Turner hold Schiff and Pelosi accountable with a contribution today!
Thank you,

Team Turner

body:

[We need your help to fight back. Friends,
**Susan Collins just went up with yet _another_ attack ad against us.**
Here is the truth: Susan Collins will be able to run a relentless string of attack ads because her campaign is funded almost exclusively by special interests and big-dollar donations made by people who appreciate her Kavanaugh vote and her support of Donald Trump and his agenda.
Our ability to fight back depends on people like you, because the overwhelming majority of the donations we receive come from people giving small amounts. And that means we have to ask:
[**Rush a $3 contribution right away to help us fight back against Republican attacks. We need your help to set the record straight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f9b/4bef7a87/6b9fd05a/287fe7af/1185153472/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDQtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191204-2-full")
We're not just taking on Susan Collins in this election. We are also taking on enormously powerful industries and special interest groups that will spend whatever it takes to preserve the status quo.
We're not saying that to scare you. This race is winnable! If it weren't, Republicans wouldn't be pouring money into attack ads against us!
We say it to remind you that the stakes are high in this race. Democrats _have_ to win in Maine in order to take back the Senate. It won't be easy, but if we are in this together, we can do it.
\- Team Sara

body:
This is going to be crucial to our success as a campaign. So much is riding on the next month, and it could make or break our movement.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4159%2E377263%2EgVbc5d) Yang Gang --

This is Zach Fang, the Organizing Director here at Yang2020. We’re working hard here in Iowa, which is just two months away from voting. But to win, we have to fully fund our program.

We need $38,531 by midnight tonight so that we can hire more organizers and build our organizing program across the state. This is going to be crucial to our success as a campaign. So much is riding on the next month, and it could make or break our movement.

**We’ve got the big, bold ideas to move our economy forward and put humanity first -- let’s show everyone this team is willing to fight for it.
